title: Reality Ledger Entry
description: Closed-loop reality feedback record. Every non-trivial claim carries prediction, observed result, delta, and lesson. F2 TRUTH: delta_from_prediction is a mandatory field for SEAL-grade entries.

evidence_refs.description: Artifact IDs, URLs, or VAULT999 hashes backing this claim

confidence.description: What the system believed before action

uncertainty_band.description: P10-P90 range at time of prediction

prediction.description: What the system predicted would happen — the counterfactual ground

action_taken.description: What was actually executed or blocked (include tool + args hash)

observed_result.description: What actually happened — observed outcome or error state

delta_from_prediction.description: Qualitative delta between prediction and observation

delta_numeric.description: Quantified delta magnitude (0.0 = exact match, 1.0 = complete miss)

lesson.description: What policy, threshold, or heuristic changes as a result

vault999_seal.description: VAULT999 entry ID or hash anchoring this record

actor.description: Agent or system ID that generated this claim

tearframe_metrics.description: TEARFRAME thermodynamic metrics at seal time
